name: hermes
_comment: VERIFIED 2026-07-08 against Hermes Agent v0.18.1 (macOS, local Ollama qwen3:14b @ 64k ctx) via scripts/verify_harness.py. The briefing is INLINED into the prompt via shell substitution rather than passed as a file path: small local models sometimes emit their file-read tool call as text instead of executing it, so `hermes -z` with the briefing already in the prompt is the reliable shape. Requires model.ollama_num_ctx >= 65536 in ~/.hermes/config.yaml (Hermes enforces a 64k-context minimum). Ships enabled:false by default.
command: hermes -z "You were woken by ZugaMind, a cognition sidecar. Here is the briefing: $(head -c 2000 {briefing_file}). Act on what it asks."
